name: Bistro Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: scrubbed clean, cut into large chunks
4 medium sweet potatoes, peeled, cut into large chunks
Salt and fresh ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the potatoes and sweet potatoes in a large pan.
(Note: Equal-size chunks are important so they cook at the same rate.)
2. Cover with cold water and add the sea salt.
3. Bring to a boil and cook until tender when poked with a fork, about 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Drain the water from the pan.
5. Heat the cream, milk, and butter over low heat; do not boil.
6. With a potato masher or large fork, crush the potatoes in their pan, adding the cream mixture a little at a time.
7. Season lightly with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
8. Continue mashing until the potatoes are blended well. There should still be some chunks left, with the red potato skins dispersed throughout.
9. Add more cream, milk, or butter if necessary.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning, stir in chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, and transfer to a serving bowl.
